title: Robinhood Markets: A Solid Q4 Despite Crypto Weakness
text: Analysis of Robinhood's Q4 2025 results highlighting strength beyond cryptocurrency revenue. Q4 2025 Overview: Record Q4 revenues of $1.28 billion, up 27% year-over-year, demonstrated business resilience. Despite recent crypto market weakness, Robinhood showed strength in core metrics. Revenue Breakdown: Transaction-based revenues up 15% to $776M, with particularly strong crypto surge previously in 2024. Net interest revenues surged 39% to $411M, showing lending business growth. Other revenues up 109% to $96M, driven by Gold subscription strength. Positive Drivers: Gold subscriber growth accelerated with 58% year-over-year increase to 4.2M subscribers. Interest income growth indicates expanding lending business. Prediction markets gaining traction as revenue contributor. Cryptocurrency Concerns: While Q4 showed strength, crypto revenue swings remain a key headwind. Previous 700% crypto surge in Q4 2024 created tough comparison. Near-term crypto market weakness expected to impact earnings. Asset Growth: Platform assets reached record levels with strong net deposits. Assets under management growth demonstrates customer expansion. Long-term Outlook: Despite crypto volatility concerns, business fundamentals remain solid. Recurring revenue from Gold subscriptions provides stability. New product initiatives creating diversified revenue streams. Valuation Support: Results support higher valuation multiples if growth continues.
